data.title: Sony Financial Analyst Warns of Potential USD/JPY Volatility Amid Market Closure
data.description: Sony Financial Group analyst Juntaro Morimoto has cautioned that the USD/JPY exchange rate might reach the 160 mark due to thin trading conditions during the Good Friday market closure. According to Jin10, Morimoto emphasized the risk of significant price fluctuations in a low liquidity environment if U.S. non-farm payroll data deviates from market expectations. On Friday morning, Japan's Finance Minister Satuki Katayama reiterated her stance on intervening in the foreign exchange market to support the yen. She highlighted the potential impact of forex volatility on daily life and the economy, stating, "We have consistently affirmed our readiness to take decisive action and pledge to protect what must be protected."

data.title: An account that lost over $5.5 million purchased $350,000 worth of NBA regular season game points spread game between the Thunder and the Lakers.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account (address: 0x492442eab586f242b53bda933fd5de859c8a3782) that lost over $5.5 million in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Thunder vs. Lakers" prediction event purchased $350,000 worth of shares, predicting the Thunder would beat the Lakers with a 9.5-point spread, at an average opening price of 49.4¢. The NBA regular season game between the Thunder and the Lakers tipped off at 9:30 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end, with the Thunder holding a 60-16 record, ranking 1st in the Western Conference; the Lakers have a 50-26 record, ranking 3rd in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, anticipating changes before pricing.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. Polymarket secures La Liga license, becoming its exclusive prediction market partner; 2. The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission sues three states, claiming exclusive regulatory authority over prediction markets; 3. Opinion: Weak U.S. economy, private credit pressure, and war factors drive Bitcoin to $75,000; 4. Lighter founder: Application process for on-chain derivatives trading license initiated; 5. Todd Blanche appointed acting U.S. Attorney General, previously held valuable crypto assets; 6. Chicago Fed President: Oil price shock is unfortunate and will significantly push up inflation expectations; 7. Polymarket: Will provide over $5 million in LP subsidies for sports events in April; 8. Tether launches final fundraising push with a $500 billion valuation; 9. New York Fed President warns that oil price increases triggered by the Iran war could impact the overall economy; 10. SpaceX IPO targets over $2 trillion valuation, plans to raise up to $75 billion.

data.title: Thunder vs. Lakers: High-Stakes Bet on Polymarket
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the Polymarket prediction event for the NBA regular season game between the Oklahoma City Thunder and the Los Angeles Lakers. According to Odaily, an account with a loss exceeding $5.5 million has invested $350,000 on the Thunder to win against the Lakers with a 9.5-point spread, at an average opening price of 49.4¢.

The game commenced today at 9:30 AM UTC+8. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the Thunder hold a record of 60 wins and 16 losses, securing the top position in the Western Conference. Meanwhile, the Lakers have achieved 50 wins and 26 losses, placing them third in the same conference.

data.title: The US SOL spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $932,900 in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $932,900 yesterday (April 2nd, Eastern Time). Only the Fidelity Solana Fund ETF (FSOL) saw net inflows yesterday, with a single-day net inflow of $932,900, bringing its historical total net inflow to $151 million. As of press time, the SOL spot ETF has a total net asset value of $771 million, an equity ratio of 1.70%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $980 million.

data.title: Polymarket secures La Liga license, becoming the latter's exclusive prediction market partner.
data.description: Polymarket officially announced on X that it has reached an exclusive prediction market partnership agreement with La Liga, making La Liga the first major European football league to reach an agreement with a prediction market. Following the agreement, official match prediction markets for teams such as Real Madrid and Barcelona will be exclusively available on Polymarket.

data.title: Polymarket Predicts Genius FDV to Surpass $1 Billion Post-Listing
data.description: Polymarket has introduced a new market predicting the Fully Diluted Valuation (FDV) of Genius one day after its listing. According to NS3.AI, the market currently shows a 74% probability that Genius's FDV will exceed $1 billion. Genius has previously announced that its Token Generation Event (TGE) is scheduled to take place before April 12.

data.title: Starbucks Expands Franchise Model in China with Boyu Capital Partnership
data.description: Starbucks has finalized its joint venture with Boyu Capital in China, encompassing approximately 8,000 directly operated coffee shops. According to NS3.AI, the collaboration will see these stores gradually shift to a franchise model. Both parties have set a goal to expand the network to 20,000 stores, marking a significant growth strategy in the region.

data.title: Polymarket has added a new "Genius FDV One Day After Opening" prediction event, with a 74% probability of exceeding $100 million.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, Polymarket has added a new "Genius FDV One Day After Opening" prediction event. Currently, the probability of FDV exceeding $100 million one day after opening is 74%, and the probability of exceeding $200 million is 33%. Last Friday, Genius announced on the X platform that the airdrop would account for 21% of the total token supply, divided into three seasons: Season 1, Season 2, and Season 3, each accounting for 7%. As previously stated by Genius, Season 1 will end before April 12th, and a TGE will take place before April 12th. Therefore, the community airdrop during the TGE will be 7% of the total token supply, or 70 million tokens. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Lighter founder: The application process for an on-chain derivatives trading license has been initiated.
data.description: Lighter founder and CEO Vladimir Novakovski stated in yesterday's Q1 investor call that Lighter has initiated the application process for an on-chain derivatives trading license, which is not feasible without a license if it wants to attract large traditional financial institutions like Citadel.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Google Quantum AI Research Predicts Potential Threat to Bitcoin Security by 2029
data.description: Google Quantum AI research indicates that quantum computers may be capable of compromising the elliptic-curve cryptography used by Bitcoin with fewer than 500,000 qubits, potentially advancing the timeline for a Q-Day to 2029. According to NS3.AI, a separate report on Ethereum identified up to five attack vectors, estimating that $100 billion in DeFi and tokenized assets could be vulnerable. While these quantum machines remain theoretical, quantum-resistant tokens have seen double-digit percentage increases.

data.title: Lighter Initiates On-Chain Derivatives Trading License Application
data.description: Lighter's founder and CEO, Vladimir Novakovski, announced during the Q1 investor call yesterday that the company has begun the process of applying for an on-chain derivatives trading license. According to Odaily, Novakovski emphasized that obtaining a license is essential for attracting major traditional financial institutions like Citadel.

data.title: Trump Appoints Todd Blanche as Acting Attorney General After Firing Pam Bondi
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has appointed Todd Blanche as the acting attorney general following the dismissal of Pam Bondi. According to NS3.AI, Blanche, who previously held up to $470,000 in cryptocurrency assets, has been elevated to this position after serving as deputy attorney general. During his tenure as deputy, Blanche dismantled the National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team and advised prosecutors to exercise restraint in cases involving regulatory violations.

data.title: Todd Blanche has been appointed acting U.S. Attorney General; he previously held valuable crypto assets.
data.description: US President Trump announced the removal of Attorney General Tony Bundy and appointed Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche as acting Attorney General. Todd Blanche previously served as Trump's personal lawyer in his criminal cases in New York and was appointed Deputy Attorney General after Trump's re-election in 2024. During his tenure as Deputy Attorney General, Todd Blanche ordered the disbandment of the Justice Department's National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team, established in 2022 during former President Biden's term, and signed a memorandum requiring prosecutors to cease bringing lawsuits regarding regulatory violations in the crypto industry. This memorandum was cited by the US Attorney's Office for the Southern District of New York in the case of Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm, ultimately leading to the dismissal of one of the charges. According to ProPublica, Todd Blanche still held approximately $159,000 to $485,000 worth of crypto assets, including BTC, SOL, ADA, and ETH, at the time of signing the crypto enforcement memorandum, violating his previous ethical commitment to divest assets before handling crypto-related matters. His government ethics disclosure in July 2025 revealed that he had transferred his crypto assets to his children and grandchildren.

data.title: Starbucks completes its joint venture with Boyu Capital, and its directly operated stores in China will gradually transition to a franchise model.
data.description: Starbucks announced that its previously announced joint venture with Boyu Capital has been officially completed, marking a significant step forward in Starbucks' long-term strategy for sustainable and disciplined growth in China. According to the agreement, the joint venture currently operates approximately 8,000 company-owned Starbucks coffee shops, which will gradually transition to a franchise model. The shared long-term goal is to eventually expand the number of stores to 20,000. (The Paper)

data.title: TRUMP Token Event to Feature Mike Tyson at Exclusive Mar-a-Lago Luncheon
data.description:
On April 3, TRUMP Token announced that boxing legend Mike Tyson will attend the TRUMP Token holders' luncheon at Mar-a-Lago on April 25. According to BlockBeats, Tyson is set to deliver a speech at this exclusive cryptocurrency and business conference. Previously, it was reported that U.S. President Donald Trump will host a grand luncheon for TRUMP Token holders, accompanied by 18 'superstars.' The top 297 holders will be allowed to participate in the April 25 luncheon at Mar-a-Lago, while the top 29 holders will be invited to a special VIP reception and champagne toast alongside President Trump.

Currently, the leaderboard for TRUMP Token holders is led by 'Sun,' with the second position held by the Chinese ID 'Xiao x.'

data.title: A newly created address hoarded 490,000 HYPE tokens, worth $17.18 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created address received 488,599 HYPE tokens from FalconX, worth $17.18 million.

data.title: Chicago Fed President: The oil price shock came at an inopportune time and will significantly push up inflation expectations.
data.description: FOMC voting member and Chicago Fed President John Goolsby said on Thursday that the economy is suffering from the oil price shock, which he is concerned about as the inflation caused by last year's tariff shock has not yet subsided. Goolsby stated, "When gasoline prices rise sharply in the short term, people's expectations for inflation over the next 12 months begin to rise significantly, which could put us in a more difficult situation." The sharp rise in oil prices since the start of the Iran-Iraq war has also exacerbated business uncertainty and slowed hiring. (Jinshi)

data.title: Account with a win rate over 70% and total purchases of $170,000. Clippers defeated Spurs in an NBA regular season game.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Clippers vs. Spurs" prediction event, an account with a winning percentage over 70% (address: 0xe934f2d7d6358c6c86bfdd5848f1e90412e9640b) purchased $170,000 worth of bets on the Clippers defeating the Spurs, with an average opening price of 54.6¢. The NBA regular season Clippers vs. Spurs game tipped off at 10:30 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end; the Clippers have a record of 39 wins and 37 losses, ranking 8th in the Western Conference; the Spurs have a record of 57 wins and 18 losses, ranking 2nd in the Western Conference. Furthermore, Spurs star player Wernbane Yamaba may miss this game. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: High-Stakes Bet on Clippers vs. Spurs NBA Game
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the outcome of the NBA regular season game between the Los Angeles Clippers and the San Antonio Spurs. According to Odaily, an account with a winning rate exceeding 70% has invested $170,000 on the Clippers to defeat the Spurs, with an opening price of 54.6 cents.

The game commenced today at 10:30 AM UTC+8. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the Clippers hold a record of 39 wins and 37 losses, placing them 8th in the Western Conference. Meanwhile, the Spurs have a record of 57 wins and 18 losses, ranking 2nd in the Western Conference. Additionally, Spurs' star player Victor Wembanyama may be absent from this match.
